_comment: Single source of truth for every DO Spaces prefix that can hold a request's media. Imported by src/services/StorageLifecycleService.ts (purge cascade) AND scripts/retention-sweep.js (daily cron sweep) — keep additions here so the two can never drift. When adding a prefix, also add a matching S3 lifecycle backstop rule on the bucket (see docs/storage-lifecycle-design.md A.3).
